evidence_refs.source_quote: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting #3 Summary

On Thursday, September 27, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the third Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at The New York Botanical Garden.
the proposed corridor design – offset bus lanes - was selected

The existing registry record for corridor_webster-ave-bronx already includes the source 2012_10_brt_webster_cac3_meeting_summary in its source list, and its payload (corridor_name: 'Webster Avenue Corridor', borough: Bronx, description: 'Proposed SBS corridor in the Bronx based on the existing Bx41 route') describes the same real-world entity. Per decision rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — never 'link' to one's own base_record_id.
